item.title: announcements
item.description: This is for announcements about the project. Only moderators may speak in here.

item.title: general
item.description: This is for messages about the project not necessarily about the current game that is taking place.

item.title: commands
item.description: The commands channel is for people to put in their personal commands to SussyBot and receive actions.

item.title: control
item.description: The control channel is for announcements about the game and nobody except moderators and SussyBot may speak in it.

item.title: ghosts
item.description: Ghosts is a place where only ghosts can talk about the current game and any events that are happening.

item.title: meeting
item.description: This channel is to discuss the current game that is happening or any kind of important info respective for that game.

item.title: config-polling
item.description: The Config polling is for polling about new configuration options or changing the current configuration options.

item.title: ideas
item.description: Ideas is a creative space for anyone to make a post (it is a Forum channel) and get suggestions on whether it should be added or not.

item.title: law-polling
item.description: This channel is for polling about new laws to change the core features of this wiki and this game.

item.title: Codes
item.description: codes This command does the same thing as Role mostly, but it also gives the codes for any in-school interactions that can take place.
